recent_excerpts: Microsoft released out-of-band updates for Windows Server 2019 and 2022 after April 2026 security patches caused boot failures and domain controller authentication issues, forcing some administrators
Microsoft confirms the April 2026 KB5082063 security update is causing some Windows Server 2025 devices to boot into BitLocker recovery, requiring a recovery key to regain access.

Microsoft resolves a known issue causing Windows Server 2019 and 2022 systems to automatically and unexpectedly upgrade to Windows Server 2025, a problem linked to a flawed update channel configuratio
